update_source: manual — 2025-2026 macro signals (APA, GDELT, Pew, FRED, Edelman)
note: Weights are 0.0–1.0. 1.0 = maximum cultural resonance right now. Update this file from live signals without touching conflict_ontology.json.

resonance_formula.description: Composite weight for a seed combination
resonance_formula.combination_novelty_score: 1.0 if in underexplored_combinations, 0.5 if neutral, 0.2 if in overdone_combinations
